subcodes.first_line: O thou who art seeking the good-pleasure of the Lord of Glory! I have no time to spare.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای حضرت کبریاء وقت ندارم مشغول ذکر و فکر و ماتم حضرات شهداء روحی
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
